description.unified: Deals Physical DMG to enemies in the frontal area 2 times, and inflicts Down for 1.5 sec. [God's Proxy]: Damage increases by 25%, attack range increases by 50%, and Down duration increases by 0.5 sec.

Dashes behind the enemy and deals Physical DMG to enemies in range 3 times, increasing Physical DMG taken by [30%->24%] for [4 sec->5 sec]. [God's Proxy]: Damage increases by 25%, skill cast time is reduced by 1 sec, and Critical Rate is applied [500->600] higher.

Deals Physical DMG to nearby enemies and inflicts Stun for [2 sec->1 sec], then enters [God's Proxy] state for 10 sec, enhancing skills. [God's Proxy]: ATK increases by [30% ATK Speed (removed), 300 Physical Evasion (removed), 600 Status Resistance (removed)], and Normal Attack DMG increases by [150%->100%]. This effect cannot be dispelled.

ATK increases by [85*(1+0.3*Skill Level) M.DEF->192*(0.7+(0.3*Skill Level*Awakening Coefficient)) ATK], and Magic Evasion increases by [250->240]. When [Holy Sword Ea] is equipped, damage dealt to non-hero enemies increases by [30%->20%], and damage taken from non-hero enemies is reduced by [30%->20%].

dark.unified: On hit, increases the target’s Physical DMG taken by [24% (added)] for 5 sec.

light.unified: Physical Evasion increases by [140 (added)] for the duration.

dark.unified: Damage dealt to non-hero enemies increases by [100%->34%] for the duration.

light.unified: ATK increase amount increases by 50%. [(removed) Physical Evasion increases by 150. On evasion, restores 5% of Max HP. This effect can only trigger once every 3 sec.]

dark.unified: On evasion, restores 6% [5%->6%] of Max HP every 3 sec. [(removed) Damage taken from Heroes is reduced by 15%.]

description.unified: [Judgment Blade] Reduces Cooldown by 30%, and increases DMG by {0}% upon every use. This effect can be stacked up to max 5 [10->5] times and is irremovable.
[Valiant Dash] Stuns the target for (added) 1.5 sec, and reduces Cooldown by {0}% [10%->{0}%] upon a Critical Hit. [(removed) Increases DMG by {0}%]
[Proxy of God] increases Dodge Chance by an additional 400 [250->400] and ATK Spd by an additional {0} for the duration of the Skill.
[Goddess Strike] Increases Magic Evasion by (added) 360 and increases DMG dealt to heroes by {0}%. [(removed) Increases DEF Boost by 50%, and own DMG dealt to bosses by {0}%]

dark.unified: On hit, deals additional Physical DMG equal to 60% [80%->60%] of ATK. Applied at 120% [160%->120%] against non-hero enemies and can only trigger once every 0.5 sec.
